description: Search Tip: So you don't have to scroll through pages of addresses on your state page, do this: With Windows, press Control, letter F, with Mac press Command, letter F, then type in your city, zip code, or other search criteria, such as esq. for an attorney. Try zip codes for other nearby towns. Those listings containing an asterisk (*) have sponsored a Wrightslaw conference.

name: Educational Therapy Center
city: Educational Therapy Center Lorrie Wolf 6004 B NW 9 Hwy. Parkville
description: Educational Therapy Center Lorrie Wolf 6004 B NW 9 Hwy. Parkville, MO 64152 (816) 584-8860 Email: Lorrie | at | etctutoring.org Sessions are one to one in this Kansas City area center. Multisensory techniques based on the Orton-Gillingham Approach are used to teach reading, spelling, writing and math. A baseline testing to establish present levels is required with a report that can be useful at IEP meetings.
